title: fix-first: advisor slot folded into guard model-param allowlist (live bug) + slice-close manifest regen
action: Per advisor R2 (union of configured routes incl. advisor) restricted to the claude branch, V3-independent: import resolveAdvisor into dispatch-guard.mjs and fold a resolved {type:'model'} advisor's model name into configuredModelSet's allowlist union (cli/native/null advisor contribute nothing). This can only turn a deny into an allow, never the reverse. Rewrite frozen row 22 (hooks/test_model_guard.mjs:563-572) which currently encodes the live bug (model:'fable' DENIED despite advisor:'fable' in config) — RED-first: fix flips it red, rewrite asserts the advisor model is ALLOWED (orchestrator-chartered unfreeze, recorded in trace). Deny twin row 21 (unconfigured model 'banana') stays denied 'param-not-configured'. Freeze all other guard rows green before the edit (critical-patterns 20260716). Mirror both lib copies same commit. THEN slice-close: regen the release manifest (3 files currently drifted from cnt-4's lib edits + this cell's) as a SECOND chore commit and quote a green scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check.

truths: prepare's own advisor payload (model from resolveAdvisor) passes the guard — regression row proves it
an unconfigured model param is still denied with expected-vs-got
prohibitions: no route logic outside the lib
no widening beyond the advisor slot's resolved model

verify: node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Folded resolveAdvisor into configuredModelSet's claude model-param allowlist union (allow-only-widening) so 'bee dispatch prepare --runtime claude --kind advisor' payload {model:'fable'} passes the guard instead of param-not-configured. Row22 unfrozen (orchestrator-chartered) to assert fable ALLOWED + logged model-param; row21 deny twin now asserts the advisor model appears in the FIX list. Both lib copies byte-mirrored. Codex branch untouched. Slice-close release manifest regenerated (362 files match).
trace.verify_output: guard suite: ALL PASS (incl. rewritten row22 = fable ALLOWED, row21 deny twin lists fable). test_lib_mirror: byte-identical (21 lib + 10 hook files). release_manifest --check: 362 files match stored manifest. RED-first captured before the fix: rows 21/22 FAILED with model:'fable' denied 'param-not-configured' (allowlist excluded advisor slot).
trace.verify_command: node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
